docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POWER, CHIMMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODERICK, ANTHONY $5,721.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,796.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY POWER, CHIMMY AS TO DEFENDANT RODERICK, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT. PLAINTIFF CHIMMY POWER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTHONY RODERICK IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MAXWELL PRITT; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT HAS BEEN FULLY PAID OR SATISFIED AS TO ALL JUDGMENT DEBTORS. AS TO DEFENDANT RODERICK, ANTHONY
